_publications._publicationTitle: Metalloproteinase 1 downregulation in neurofibromatosis 1: Therapeutic potential of antimalarial hydroxychloroquine and chloroquine.

_contextSnippet: Notably, CQ and HCQ significantly increased the mRNA (Fig. 3b) and protein (Fig. 3c and Supplementary Fig. S4) levels of MMP1... The MMP1 proteins upregulated by CQ and HCQ were actually released in the culture supernatants
details: 50 μM HCQ significantly increased MMP1 mRNA and protein levels in both HEFs and NFFs, with upregulated proteins released in culture supernatants
